headline: 250 years of American independence: Thomas Jefferson and John Adams, 'the North and South poles of the American Revolution'
description: 'America 250' (4/13). Fifty years to the day after the adoption of the Declaration of Independence, two of its architects died: the enigmatic Thomas Jefferson and the impulsive John Adams. This coincidence only strengthened, among the population, the sense of an unprecedented destiny promised to their nation.

Israel vows indefinite military occupation of Lebanon, Gaza and Syria
description: Leaders insist its forces will remain in all three territories for as long as it deems necessary despite ongoing diplomatic efforts and international pressure.

headline: Pesticide use rises again in France, especially for PFAS family chemicals
description: Amid the lack of a recent update to the government's longstanding pesticide-use indicator, the advocacy group Générations futures released its own calculation Thursday, based on product sales data and using the official methodology.

headline: 'Impossible to sleep': A night in sweltering France, in search of a cool spot
description: With a heatwave bearing down, the French have taken to living after dark, chasing relief from the sun's lingering grip. From Paris to Saint-Malo, by way of Orléans, parks and pools stirred to life as soon as the day ended.

headline: French tolerance remains strong, but racism and antisemitism still run deep, report finds
description: In its annual report released on Thursday, the National Consultative Commission on Human Rights expresses concern about the persistence of xenophobic prejudices in French society, particularly among the younger generation.

France faces unprecedented heatwave: 'We are about to experience four of the hottest days ever recorded in the country'
description: A prolonged heatwave, rather than a brief spike, has arrived. Unusually high temperatures are set to persist across the country until at least the end of this week, exposing more than 90% of the French population to extreme and rare heat.

headline: Masculinism, an increasingly widespread, violent and popular ideology among French youth
description: According to a report written by the Sénat's delegation for women's rights and published on Wednesday, the movement, which has close ties to the far right, is now considered an emerging terrorist threat and a cause for serious concern.

headline: The unavoidable rise of a less American world
description: The war in the Middle East has sped up a realignment that was already underway, forcing the US's partners to rethink flexible alliances without creating overly strong dependencies.
